query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sellers) as sellers_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_leads) as leads_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_messages) as messages_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory_vehicles) as vehicles_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales) as sales_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fin_transactions) as fin_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pv_chamados) as pv_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fichas_financiamento) as fichas_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications) as notifications_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_activities) as activities_count;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 72z9zwCQQTtJjjC.7f634d589b23 --database NKs9YYU4Bt79zUwnWH56wx --execute SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sellers) as sellers_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_leads) as leads_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_messages) as messages_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inventory_vehicles) as vehicles_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales) as sales_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fin_transactions) as fin_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pv_chamados) as pv_count,
